specific_mechanism: Faceting: cut gemstone into N-fold symmetric facets to maximize internal reflection; each facet defect reduces brilliance topologically
llm_application: LLM activation faceting: cut model's representation space into N-fold symmetric features (sparse autoencoder); each feature defect reduces interpretability brilliance.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes lapidary-faceting topological-defect mapping as proposed.
